preferred_name: availability of parts after ceased supply by manufacturer

preferred_name_ml.en: availability of parts after ceased supply by manufacturer

definition: website with list of suppliers of spare and/or wear parts of the item, if the original manufacturer has ceased their supply

definition_ml.en: website with list of suppliers of spare and/or wear parts of the item, if the original manufacturer has ceased their supply

note: In some countries this may be requested by law.

note_ml.en: In some countries this may be requested by law.

remark: If a manufacturer stops supplying spare or wear parts of a given item, the allocation of its constructional data to public by the manufacturer needs to be free of rights  in order to allow a third party to run the risk of their remanufacture (e.g. by 3D printer)

remark_ml.en: If a manufacturer stops supplying spare or wear parts of a given item, the allocation of its constructional data to public by the manufacturer needs to be free of rights  in order to allow a third party to run the risk of their remanufacture (e.g. by 3D printer)
